artifacts.sourceTitle: 國立成功大學生成式 AI 於教學研究的學術誠信指引
國立成功大學生成式 AI 於教學研究的學術誠信指引

artifacts.claimText: NCKU academic-integrity guidance says faculty, students, and researchers should verify generative-AI outputs, and that using generative AI for plagiarism, fabrication, or falsification breaches academic integrity; students should follow course rules and should not submit AI-generated content as their own without permission.

citation.citationTitle: 國立成功大學生成式 AI 於教學研究的學術誠信指引
citation.publisher: National Cheng Kung University Academic Integrity Promotion Office
citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.claimText: NCKU guidance says faculty, students, and researchers using generative AI in research should work to ensure reproducibility and stability of research results and appropriately disclose the AI tool name, version, date, and method of use.

citation.citationTitle: 國立成功大學生成式 AI 於教學研究的學術誠信指引
citation.publisher: National Cheng Kung University Academic Integrity Promotion Office
citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.claimText: NCKU guidance tells faculty, students, and researchers not to provide unpublished research or sensitive content to generative AI, notes that shared data may be retained as training data, and says generative AI should be avoided in confidential research activities such as peer review or research-proposal review.

citation.citationTitle: 國立成功大學生成式 AI 於教學研究的學術誠信指引
citation.publisher: National Cheng Kung University Academic Integrity Promotion Office
citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.claimText: NCKU guidance says generative AI can assist with brainstorming, literature review, and manuscript polishing, but cannot replace critical thinking, decision-making, or interpretation; generative AI cannot be listed as an author or co-author, and the author/user remains fully responsible for the work.

citation.citationTitle: 國立成功大學生成式 AI 於教學研究的學術誠信指引
citation.publisher: National Cheng Kung University Academic Integrity Promotion Office
citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.claimText: NCKU guidance says generative-AI acceptance, use, and ethical considerations differ by discipline; faculty, students, and researchers should respect disciplinary differences and confirm a target journal's generative-AI policy before submission.

citation.citationTitle: 國立成功大學生成式 AI 於教學研究的學術誠信指引
citation.publisher: National Cheng Kung University Academic Integrity Promotion Office
citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.sourceTitle: 國立成功大學生成式 AI 於教學研究的學術誠信指引
artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: 師生及研究人員使用生成式 AI 輔助生成之內容，應謹慎查驗其準確性...不允許任何使用生成式 AI 剽竊、偽造、變造數據、圖表等違反學術誠信行為。學生於學習過程中，應遵循教師在課程中關於使用生成式 AI 之規則，未經允許，不應將其生成之內容...作為自己之作業、報告、創作、展演及論文等提交。
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: The guideline says users should verify AI outputs, forbids AI-enabled plagiarism/fabrication/falsification, and tells students to follow course rules before submitting AI-generated content.
artifacts.evidenceLocator: PDF section I. Upholding Academic Integrity
artifacts.rightsNote: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

citation.citationTitle: 國立成功大學生成式 AI 於教學研究的學術誠信指引
citation.publisher: National Cheng Kung University Academic Integrity Promotion Office
citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.sourceTitle: 國立成功大學生成式 AI 於教學研究的學術誠信指引
artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: 師生及研究人員應致力於確保研究結果和結論之可重複性與穩定性，並於研究中適當揭露 AI 工具的參與程度，如:工具名稱、版本、日期及使用方法，以利他人理解及評估研究之可靠性。
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: The guideline calls for reproducibility and disclosure of the AI tool name, version, date, and method of use in research.
artifacts.evidenceLocator: PDF section II. Responsible Use and Disclosure of AI Tools
artifacts.rightsNote: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

citation.citationTitle: 國立成功大學生成式 AI 於教學研究的學術誠信指引
citation.publisher: National Cheng Kung University Academic Integrity Promotion Office
citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.sourceTitle: 國立成功大學生成式 AI 於教學研究的學術誠信指引
artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: 切勿將未發表之研究或機敏內容提供給生成式 AI，並應了解任何與生成式 AI 共享之資料，都可能被收錄於訓練資料庫中...在具保密義務之研究活動中(如:同儕審查、研究計畫審查)，應避免使用生成式 AI，以免影響他人或組織之權益。
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: The guideline warns against sharing unpublished or sensitive research with generative AI and against use in confidential research activities.
artifacts.evidenceLocator: PDF section III. Respect for the work of others and Safeguard Privacy
artifacts.rightsNote: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

citation.citationTitle: 國立成功大學生成式 AI 於教學研究的學術誠信指引
citation.publisher: National Cheng Kung University Academic Integrity Promotion Office
citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.sourceTitle: 國立成功大學生成式 AI 於教學研究的學術誠信指引
artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: 生成式 AI 可以協助發想議題、查閱文獻、潤飾文稿等，但不能取代師生及研究者進行批判性思考、決策和結果詮釋...生成式 AI 不能作為作者或共同作者...即使研究中的部分內容是由生成式 AI 工具生成，研究人員也應對其研究負全部責任。
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: The guideline frames generative AI as assistive, not a replacement for researcher judgment, and says it cannot be an author or co-author.
artifacts.evidenceLocator: PDF section IV. Responsible AI Use and Research Accountability
artifacts.rightsNote: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

citation.citationTitle: 國立成功大學生成式 AI 於教學研究的學術誠信指引

artifacts.sourceTitle: 國立成功大學生成式 AI 於教學研究的學術誠信指引
artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: 不同學科領域對於生成式 AI 之接受程度、使用方式及倫理考量皆有所不同，仍需學術社群自主性的規範...師生及研究人員於投稿前，務必確認該投稿期刊之生成式 AI 政策，以符合該學術社群之要求。
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: The guideline says generative-AI norms differ by discipline and users should check journal AI policies before submission.
artifacts.evidenceLocator: PDF section V. Embracing Openness and Respecting Disciplinary Differences

artifacts.title: National Cheng Kung University AI Policy Staged Source Review
artifacts.summary: Official NCKU sources support staged candidate claims from the Academic Integrity Promotion Office generative-AI academic-integrity guideline for teaching and research. The strongest evidence is the central page and attached Traditional Chinese/English PDF. Claims cover academic-integrity limits, research disclosure, privacy/confidentiality, assistive use and authorship, and disciplinary differences in journal policy expectations.
limitations: This tracker is not legal advice, not academic integrity advice, and not an official university statement unless a linked source is the university's own official page.
The English text in the PDF states it was translated from the Chinese original and that the Chinese version takes precedence; staged evidence therefore preserves Traditional Chinese snippets.
Department reposts, stale library URLs, and faculty-specific sources were not used for broad claims.
artifacts.sourceRightsPolicy: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.
